items.title: The war has been a disaster for Trump and his aims in Iran are unmet

children.content: The ceasefire agreement fits a pattern from Donald Trump where the signing of a deal appears to be the major goal and the details often seem a distant secondary consideration.

articles.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz will be 'completely open' by Friday. Then what?

children.content: The months-long shutdown of the the crucial shipping route has rocked global oil markets and flowed through to all sorts of prices. How will the reopening change things, and how fast?

items.title: RBA tipped to keep rates on hold as ASX falls

children.content: Local shares are in the red despite a Wall Street rally overnight. The cash rate is widely forecast to remain unchanged at 4.35 per cent, after three consecutive rate hikes this year. Follow the day's events and insights from our business reporters on the ABC News live markets blog.

items.title: Beleaguered KPMG referred to anti-corruption watchdog amid contract freeze

items.title: Quick hits: Cabo Verde finds player on LinkedIn, meet Merlin the Duck
